delete_workspace_warning: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? The branch and any unmerged commits will be permanently deleted.
add_remote_conn_hint: Paste the connection string shown by claudette-server on the remote machine.
rollback_clear_all: Clear the entire conversation and start fresh?
rollback_to_before: Roll back to before this message? All messages after this point will be removed.
rollback_restore_files: Also restore files to this checkpoint
nightly_warning: Nightly builds are untested pre-releases built from the latest main branch. They may contain bugs or break features. You can switch back to Stable at any time.
relink_warning: Path for {{name}} is no longer valid. Provide the new location.
remove_repo_warning: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}}? This will not delete the repository from disk, only unregister it.
share_conn_hint: Share this string with others so they can connect to your workspaces from their Claudette app.
setup_script_warning: This workspace has a setup script from {{source}} that will be executed. Please review it before proceeding.
setup_script_always_run: Always run setup scripts for this repo
archive_script_warning: This workspace has an archive script from {{source}} that will be executed before the worktree is removed. Please review it before proceeding.
archive_script_always_run: Always run archive scripts for this repo
import_worktrees_none_found: No existing worktrees found for this repository.
import_worktrees_found_desc: These git worktrees already exist for this repository. Select which ones to import as workspaces:
mcp_servers_none_found: No non-portable MCP servers detected for this repository.
mcp_servers_detected_desc: These MCP servers are configured for this project but won't be automatically available in workspaces. Select which to include:
missing_cli_no_guidance: No installation guidance is available for this tool — please consult its documentation.
share_list_hint: Each share grants access to a specific set of workspaces. Stopping a share immediately revokes its connection string and all sessions paired through it.
share_form_hint: Pick which workspaces this share grants access to. The recipient will only ever see what you select here.
share_form_collaborative: Collaborative — multiple users can prompt the agent
share_form_validation_pick_workspace: Pick at least one workspace to share.
